rpds-py
=======

# Available modules


The overview below shows which rpds-py installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using rpds-py, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load rpds-py/0.30.0-GCCcore-15.2.0
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
